positive: A minimalist, geometric line art illustration of a whimsical woodland creature—a stylized deer or fawn—perched on a crescent moon. The composition must be perfectly centered, featuring clean, continuous lines with high contrast against a solid background. Use an ethereal color palette of muted sage green, dusty lavender, and soft terracotta. The style should be 'abstract decorative engraving' mixed with 'mid-century Scandinavian folk art.' The scene must emphasize clear silhouettes and negative space for optimal print placement on fabric. Cinematic studio lighting, high detail, vector art quality.
